Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 0 25 25}Man... I keep running into you at the weirdest times.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 13 8 5 105}You remembered what we talked about last time? Nothing gets past you, eh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}So, yeah... I just got back from the hospital.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}They had the results from my last exam.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}You gotta be kidding... Why can't I... stand up!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 0 25 25}I appreciate the offer, though. Could I maybe just borrow your shoulder instead?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}W-Wait! I don't want to cause a scene![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 3 25 25}Please, it's fine. Could you maybe just lend me a shoulder?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Funny, huh? All from just crouching down to tie my shoes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 3 25 25}Good thing you were around. If it were anyone else, then the rest of the team would've found out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 1 25 25}Thanks, man. I'm really grateful to have you as a friend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto seems to really appreciate me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're becoming closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Alright, I'm gonna go train by myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 0 25 25}Even if practice is over, I can't skip out on training. The big meet's not that far off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 1 25 25}You're heading home, right? Then we'll train together next time. Take it easy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Miyamoto[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
